programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders
programme.desc: The police get a call from a member of the public who has just been robbed by a gang of males armed with a crowbar and an air rifle. A pursuit goes off road and the car is lost, but with the help of the police chopper, the gang are discovered - hiding out in a hot tub! Cops also spot a BMW driver with his foot down. When the police get behind the car, the rear wheel is so worn down that sparks are coming from the tyre! And after some checks, the vehicle also has links to drugs. And in Hull, PCs race after a report of a pedestrian knocked over by a car. Series Prod: Johnny Perks; Exec Prods: Zoë Callan/Dympna Jackson; Dirs: John Nichols/Phil Hirst/Emma Fraser; Purple Productions (S9 Ep7)

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Taking Down the Shoplifting Gangs
programme.desc: After Roads Police in Beverley stopped a man linked to organised crime - finding £1300 in stolen goods and a woman tied to UK-wide shop thefts - national police intelligence unit Opal connected them to £78,000 in thefts. PC Elijah must collate intelligence from 23 police forces across the country, scanning 700 clips of CCTV and putting the allegations to the suspects in interview. Will they confess? In Lancashire, police arrest notorious shoplifter 'Michael', suspected of multiple thefts and a robbery, with only 24 hours before he must either be charged or released. And In Preston, the police's shoplifting task force Operation Vulture locate 'Ben', a well-known shoplifter suspected of stealing eight times from the same supermarket. Series Prod/Dir: David McConnell; Prods/Dirs: Josh Beattie/Cara Bowen; Exec Prods: Tom Edwards/Steve Warr; Raw Cut (S1 Ep4)
We follow the police battling the shoplifting gangs hitting high streets across the UK.
